title: market-regime output
description: Canonical output of the market-regime skill. Layer 1 (structured) consumed by UIs, dashboards, and downstream agents (other skills can read composite_regime.label to qualify their own reads). Claude Code rendering described in references/rendering.md.

as_of.description: Date of the regime read (latest available trading day).

fetched_at.description: UTC wall-clock timestamp when the run executed.

lookback_days.description: Trading-day lookback used for VIX percentile rank and RS windows. Default 252.

benchmark.description: Benchmark ticker used for trend + RS denominator. Default SPY.

spy_trend.description: SPY price, SMAs, trend bucket, and rolling returns. Null if insufficient history (need >= 200 trading days).

trend.description: uptrend_strong: price > 20 > 50 > 200. uptrend_weak: price above 50 and 200 but not stacked. range: mixed. downtrend_weak: price below 50 and 200 but not stacked. downtrend_strong: price < 20 < 50 < 200.

vix_state.description: VIX block. Null when VIX serves under neither `VIX` nor `I:VIX` on the caller's key (regime then computed without volatility component; tier_caveat surfaces it).

percentile_rank.description: 0-100 percentile rank of `current` vs the trailing lookback_days. Null if distribution is below percentile module's MIN_DISTRIBUTION_N.

rank_label.description: Human label for the rank: 'top 5%', 'top quartile', 'median', etc.

state.description: Absolute-level bucket: quiet<15, normal 15-22, elevated 22-30, stressed>=30.

source.description: Which ticker actually served the data: `VIX` or `I:VIX`.

read.description: Human label: 'broad participation' (>=70%), 'mixed participation' (>=50%), 'narrow participation' (>=30%), 'thin participation' (<30%), or 'insufficient data'.

sector_leadership.description: Per-sector returns + 20-day RS vs SPY. Null when SPY 20-day return or sector data is unavailable.

reasons.description: Explicit evidence list. Each entry is a short clause describing the supporting (or offsetting) pillar reading.

tier_caveats.description: Always includes the sector-ETF breadth proxy caveat. Adds the VIX-unavailable caveat when both `VIX` and `I:VIX` return empty.
